top_tweets.text:
DHH spent 20 years dismissing product management.

Then 1h21 into his Pragmatic Engineer interview, he caught himself and admitted he was wrong.

He was listing what matters now that AI writes the code: figuring out what to build, how to build it, which customers to talk to, https://t.co/xx4kZImV14
top_tweets.author: nurijanian
top_tweets.name: George from 🕹prodmgmt.world
top_tweets.summary_zh: DHH 在 Pragmatic Engineer 訪談中承認過去 20 年對產品管理的輕視是錯的，當 AI 能寫程式後，真正重要的反而是決定要做什麼、怎麼做、該跟哪些客戶對話等 PM 核心能力。

top_tweets.text:
Anthropic just pulled Claude Code from the Pro plan.

Pro users wanting it need Max now. 

$100/month minimum. 5x jump.

I'm on Max 20x so I'm fine. 

Flagging for anyone on Pro who's about to find out.

No announcement. Just a pricing page edit. https://t.co/sNxZKHh367
top_tweets.author: TheGeorgePu
top_tweets.name: George Pu
top_tweets.summary_zh: Anthropic 無預警將 Claude Code 從 Pro 方案（$20/月）移除，現在必須升級到 Max（$100/月起）才能使用，價格直接跳 5 倍，只有在定價頁面靜默更新。

top_tweets.text:
Claude Design: Gets announced.
AI bros: DESIGNERS COOKED! 
Anthropic: Hiring more designers at $400K+/year https://t.co/B9qF80K4j9
top_tweets.author: michalmalewicz
top_tweets.name: Michal Malewicz
top_tweets.summary_zh: Claude Design 推出後 AI 圈高喊「設計師完蛋了」，但 Anthropic 本身仍在以年薪 40 萬美元以上招募更多設計師，顯示工具與專業角色價值的落差。

top_tweets.text:
Claude Design surprised me. It's actually quite good. I hit some rough edges but I still think it is worth trying and thinking deeply about.

Props to Anthropic, they cooked here. https://t.co/qTW2bPOi8U
top_tweets.author: theo
top_tweets.name: Theo - t3.gg
top_tweets.summary_zh: Theo 實測 Claude Design 後認為雖有粗糙邊角，但整體表現超出預期，值得深入探索，給予 Anthropic 正面評價。

top_tweets.text:
Did you know Claude Design has a dedicated mode for exploring ideas, before jumping to pixels? It's called "Wireframe"
As a quick example, let's look at how I could explore making an app for comic book storyboards. https://t.co/Q2nrrebI0S
top_tweets.author: Flomerboy
top_tweets.name: Ryan Mather
top_tweets.summary_zh: Claude Design 內建「Wireframe」模式，讓你在進入視覺設計前先專注探索 idea 和結構，作者示範用它快速探索漫畫分鏡 app 概念。

top_tweets.text: This month, Ternus overhauled the hardware engineering group around what he calls a new AI platform designed to speed up product development and improve quality. It’s indicative of his plan to deploy AI quickly throughout the company to improve operations. https://t.co/ZXAxGflFnf
top_tweets.author: markgurman
top_tweets.name: Mark Gurman
top_tweets.summary_zh: Apple 硬體工程主管 Ternus 本月重組團隊，建立新的 AI 平台以加速產品開發與提升品質，顯示蘋果正在全公司快速部署 AI 改善營運。

top_tweets.text:
⚠️ Critical Anthropic’s MCP Vulnerability Enables Remote Code Execution Attacks 

Source: https://t.co/Xm2szC0l2K

A critical flaw in Anthropic’s Model Context Protocol (MCP) exposes over 150 million downloads to potential compromise. The vulnerability could enable full system https://t.co/TxQakr5E3M
top_tweets.author: The_Cyber_News
top_tweets.name: Cyber Security News
top_tweets.summary_zh: Anthropic 的 Model Context Protocol (MCP) 被發現重大漏洞，超過 1.5 億次下載可能受影響，攻擊者可能藉此執行遠端程式碼並取得系統控制權。

top_tweets.text:
I've been building apps with AI for the past year and this design resource list is actually INSANE.

If you're building with Lovable, Rork, or Claude, bookmark every single site in this tweet.
top_tweets.author: PrajwalTomar_
top_tweets.name: Prajwal Tomar
top_tweets.summary_zh: 作者整理出一份 AI 設計資源清單，特別推薦給使用 Lovable、Rork 或 Claude 等工具建構產品的團隊，號稱內容品質極高值得收藏。

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容
